title: HubMAP Pancreas PNNL TMC Overview of Proteomics, Lipidomics, and Metabolomics Assays From Sample Generation to Data Pre-processing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4mkdn","text":"This master protocol summarizes the protocols utilized in the HuBMAP Lung Tissue Mapping Center (TMC) Project to generate proteomics, lipidomics, and metabolomics from tissue blocks selected from different regions of the pancreas: head, neck, body, and tail.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: The thick sections were further extracted using a modified Folch extraction method, termed MPLEx (Metabolites, Proteins, and Lipids), as described in the following protocols.io: " Metabolites, Lipids, Protein extraction protocol (MPLEx) ".
After the MPLEx extraction, the proteins were further processed using the following protocols.io: " Proteomics Sample Preparation (Urea/trypsin digestion) - for Mammalian tissues ".
Then the data was pre-processed using the following protocols.io: " DIA data analysis in DIA-NN against a DDA library generated in FragPipe ".
After the MPLEx extraction, the lipids were further processed using the following protocols.io: " Protocol for the LC-MS/MS-based lipidomics assay of samples generated using the MPLEx method ".

After the MPLEx extraction, the metabolites were further processed using the following protocols.io: " Protocol for the LC-MS/MS-based metabolomics analysis of samples generated using the MPLEx method ". note: this protocol comprises both the analysis method and the pre-processing of the data

The prepared peptides are then injected on a dedicated liquid chromatography coupled with a tandem mass spectrometer using the following protocol: " Protocol for the LC-MS/MS-based proteomics analysis of samples generated using the MPLEx method ".
Then the data was pre-processed using the following protocols.io: " Lipidomics identifications and quantitation table generation using MS-DIAL (v4.9.221218) ".
creator: Geremy Clair
